title: Annotate Sabi Wanderer 104039620 collection
objective: Annotate every current and newly updated work by Pixiv creator 104039620, review each result, record and fix general issues, then rebuild and overwrite the Google Drive author collection.

in: tasks/translation/data/pixiv/104039620 source inventory and current translation artifacts
per-work annotation jobs, TSV candidates, refs-annotate, and rendered study files
.agents/skills/annotate and translation pipeline fixes proven necessary by real-work dogfood
agent/tasks/gh-185-annotate-104039620 execution state and GitHub issue #185 progress records
錆流浪 author collection build, Google Drive overwrite, and post-publish verification
out: semantic multi-model ranking that is not required to finish the collection
publishing private source excerpts or adult text in public GitHub comments

context_files.purpose: Per-work annotation executor and acceptance contract
Annotation density, reading, meaning, and grammar quality guidance
Artifact, candidate, version, ref, and study-rendering architecture
Supported Make entrypoints for source sync, annotation, and publishing

decisions.summary: Run one work through the complete annotate loop before starting the next.
decisions.reason: The user wants each real result reviewed so general problems are fixed before they spread across the collection.

decisions.summary: Record routine per-work evidence on #185; open a separate issue and PR only for generalizable skill or pipeline changes.
decisions.reason: This keeps GitHub readable while preserving one-issue-one-change review discipline.

decisions.summary: Do not publish source excerpts in GitHub records.
decisions.reason: The repository is public and the source works can contain adult/private reading material; segment IDs and neutral minimal examples are sufficient.

plan.title: Sync and inventory creator 104039620
acceptance: Pixiv download/update entrypoint has been run for creator 104039620.
Every current source work is listed with source revision, translation ref, annotation ref, and study status.
The existing Google Drive destination and prior managed collection files are identified without modifying them.

plan.title: Complete the per-work annotate and quality-review loop
acceptance: Each work has a candidate bound to the current source revision.
Each finish has zero unresolved segments and creates a current annotation ref plus study output.
Each work passes replay idempotence and a human sample review recorded on #185.
Generalizable defects are tracked and fixed through separate issues and PRs before continuing.

plan.title: Reconcile source updates and complete final coverage
acceptance: A final Pixiv sync finds no unprocessed new or revised work.
All translation and annotation refs match their current source revisions.
All study outputs render without unresolved segments.

plan.title: Build and overwrite the Google Drive author collection
acceptance: The author collection includes the intended study artifacts for every current work.
The mounted Google Drive destination is overwritten using the repository Make entrypoint.
Local and Drive manifests/files/digests match and obsolete managed collection files are absent.

plan.title: Close the campaign with reproducible evidence
acceptance: Issue #185 contains final work counts, validation results, publish path, and any follow-up issues.
Task state and final checkpoint are complete and reviewable.

next_action.instruction: Run the supported Pixiv update entrypoint for creator 104039620, inventory every source/translation/annotation/study artifact, and locate the previous mounted Google Drive collection without modifying it.
acceptance: The current remote-backed work set and local coverage gaps are explicit.
The prior Google Drive destination and managed files are identified.
The inventory milestone is recorded on #185.

required_commands: conda run -n llm python -m pytest tasks/translation/src -q

last_checkpoint.summary: Bootstrapped the author annotation campaign and set source/artifact inventory as the first execution unit.
